_comment: Tier 6.4 bundle size budget — headroom sized ~5-10% over the accepted baseline. Update intentionally; regression = commit refused.

_baseline_2026_04_19_phase_1_8_3._note: Phase 1.8.3.1-3 added three Intelligence-floor cards (RecommendationImpact, ChurnForecast, RiskForecast) with inline SVG chart primitives. Total chunks grew +143 KB over the 2026-04-15 baseline; budget raised from 1600000 to 1700000 to keep ~5% headroom without blocking the next Phase 1.8.3 cards.

_baseline_2026_04_20_lite_cassettoni._note: LiteCassettoniGrid (2x3 cassettoni + expandable panel + inline Donut SVG + 6 getDonutSegments + 6 getWhatToDo data-driven + 5 data-hook refactors). Adds ~96 KB total over the Phase 1.8.3 baseline. Budget raised 1700000 -> 1800000 for ~5% headroom through upcoming Lite polish + reopening Pro-floor work.

_baseline_2026_04_20_lite_v4_drawer_rich._note: Lite panel v4 — ports AbandonedIntent's DetailDrawer storytelling (mechanics+stakes / hero-stat + key-metrics + methodology / primary-action + supporting-actions) INLINE for all 6 features. Removes the <ExpandedContent> deep-card embed (was redundant). Net: LiteCassettoniGrid grew from ~40 KB to ~45 KB (6×5 new config fields, 2 new JSX sections, methodology block, primary/supporting action renderers); largest-chunk crossed 720 KB by ~5 KB. Bump largest_chunk_bytes 720000 -> 740000 for ~2% headroom. chunks_total and count unchanged direction.
